name: High Fiber Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine oat bran, rolled oats, Fiber One cereal, bran flakes, raisins, and chopped walnuts. Mix lightly and set aside.
2. In a separate mixing bowl, beat together the sugars, margarine, egg whites, and vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour mixture and water) to the sugar mixture in two additions, mixing only until the dough is moistened.
4. Fold in the bran mixture until well combined.
5. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet lined with aluminum foil or sprayed with cooking spray.
6. Bake at 375°F for 12-14 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
